title: HO2S heater control circuit (bank 1, sensor 1)
meaning: The front oxygen sensor's heater control circuit is faulty.

title: O2 sensor heater control low (bank 1, sensor 1)
meaning: The front oxygen sensor's heater circuit is drawing less current than expected.

title: HO2S heater control circuit high (bank 1, sensor 1)
meaning: The front oxygen sensor's heater circuit is drawing more current than expected.

title: Turbocharger/supercharger bypass valve control circuit
meaning: The boost bypass valve's control circuit is faulty.

title: Turbocharger/supercharger bypass valve control circuit low
meaning: The boost bypass valve's control circuit reads lower than expected.

title: Turbocharger/supercharger bypass valve control circuit high
meaning: The boost bypass valve's control circuit reads higher than expected.

title: HO2S heater control circuit (bank 1, sensor 2)
meaning: The rear oxygen sensor's heater control circuit is faulty.

title: HO2S heater control circuit low (bank 1, sensor 2)
meaning: The rear oxygen sensor's heater circuit reads lower than expected.

title: HO2S heater control circuit high (bank 1, sensor 2)
meaning: The rear oxygen sensor's heater circuit reads higher than expected.

title: O2 sensor signals swapped (bank 1/bank 2, sensor 1)
meaning: The computer thinks the two banks' front oxygen sensor wiring has been crossed.

title: O2 sensor signals swapped (bank 1/bank 2, sensor 2)
meaning: The computer thinks the two banks' rear oxygen sensor wiring has been crossed.

title: HO2S heater control circuit (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor's heater control circuit is faulty (not fitted on all engines).

title: HO2S heater control circuit low (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor's heater circuit reads lower than expected.

title: HO2S heater control circuit high (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor's heater circuit reads higher than expected.

title: Turbocharger/supercharger boost control solenoid circuit
meaning: The boost control solenoid's circuit is faulty.

title: Turbocharger/supercharger boost control solenoid range/performance
meaning: The boost control solenoid isn't behaving the way the computer expects.

title: Turbocharger/supercharger boost control solenoid circuit low
meaning: The boost control solenoid's circuit reads lower than expected.

title: Turbocharger/supercharger boost control solenoid circuit high
meaning: The boost control solenoid's circuit reads higher than expected.

title: HO2S heater control circuit (bank 2, sensor 1)
meaning: Bank 2's front oxygen sensor heater control circuit is faulty (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: HO2S heater control circuit low (bank 2, sensor 1)
meaning: Bank 2's front oxygen sensor heater circuit reads low (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: HO2S heater control circuit high (bank 2, sensor 1)
meaning: Bank 2's front oxygen sensor heater circuit reads high (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: HO2S heater resistance (bank 1, sensor 1)
meaning: The front oxygen sensor's heater resistance is out of the expected range.

title: HO2S heater resistance (bank 1, sensor 2)
meaning: The rear oxygen sensor's heater resistance is out of the expected range.

title: HO2S heater resistance (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor's heater resistance is out of range (not fitted on all engines).

title: HO2S heater control circuit (bank 2, sensor 2)
meaning: Bank 2's rear oxygen sensor heater control circuit is faulty (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: HO2S heater control circuit low (bank 2, sensor 2)
meaning: Bank 2's rear oxygen sensor heater circuit reads low (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: HO2S heater control circuit high (bank 2, sensor 2)
meaning: Bank 2's rear oxygen sensor heater circuit reads high (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: HO2S heater resistance (bank 2, sensor 1)
meaning: Bank 2's front oxygen sensor heater resistance is out of range (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: Fuel rail/system pressure too low
meaning: Fuel rail pressure is lower than the computer needs to fuel the engine properly.

title: Fuel rail/system pressure too high
meaning: Fuel rail pressure is higher than it should be.

title: Fuel pressure regulator performance
meaning: The fuel pressure regulator isn't holding pressure the way it should.

title: Fuel pressure regulator control circuit
meaning: The fuel pressure regulator's control circuit is faulty.

title: Fuel pressure regulator control circuit low
meaning: The fuel pressure regulator's control circuit reads lower than expected.

title: Fuel pressure regulator control circuit high
meaning: The fuel pressure regulator's control circuit reads higher than expected.

title: Fuel system large leak detected
meaning: The fuel system is losing pressure fast, consistent with a significant leak.

title: Fuel system small leak detected
meaning: The fuel system is losing a small amount of pressure, consistent with a minor leak.

title: Intake air temperature sensor 2 circuit
meaning: A second intake air temperature sensor's signal is faulty or missing.

title: Intake air temperature sensor 2 range/performance
meaning: The second IAT sensor's reading doesn't behave the way real air does.

title: Intake air temperature sensor 2 circuit low
meaning: The second IAT sensor's signal is stuck at the cold end of its range.

title: Intake air temperature sensor 2 circuit high
meaning: The second IAT sensor's signal is stuck at the hot end of its range.

title: Intake air temperature sensor 2 circuit intermittent
meaning: The second IAT sensor's signal cuts in and out.

title: MAP sensor circuit
meaning: The manifold pressure sensor's signal is faulty or missing.

title: MAP/BARO sensor range/performance
meaning: The manifold pressure sensor's reading doesn't match real engine conditions.

title: MAP sensor circuit low
meaning: The manifold pressure sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: MAP sensor circuit high
meaning: The manifold pressure sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: MAP sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The manifold pressure sensor's signal cuts in and out.

title: Engine coolant temperature circuit intermittent
meaning: The coolant temperature signal cuts in and out.

title: Throttle position circuit intermittent
meaning: The throttle position signal cuts in and out.

title: Barometric pressure too low
meaning: The barometric pressure reading is implausibly low for the sensor to trust.

title: O2 sensor circuit (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor's signal is faulty (not fitted on all engines).

title: O2 sensor circuit low voltage (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor reads persistently low.

title: O2 sensor circuit high voltage (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor reads persistently high.

title: O2 sensor circuit slow response (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor switches too slowly.

title: O2 sensor circuit no activity (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor's signal isn't moving at all.

title: O2 sensor heater circuit (bank 1, sensor 3)
meaning: A third-position oxygen sensor's heater circuit is faulty.

title: Fuel delivery error
meaning: Fuel delivery doesn't match what the engine is asking for.

title: Fuel timing
meaning: The fuel injection timing doesn't match what the computer commanded.

title: Fuel trim malfunction (bank 2)
meaning: The computer is having to add or remove more fuel than it should on bank 2 (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: System too lean (bank 2)
meaning: Bank 2 is getting more air than the fuel math expects (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: System too rich (bank 2)
meaning: Bank 2 is getting more fuel than the air justifies (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: Fuel composition sensor circuit

title: Fuel composition sensor circuit high
meaning: The flex-fuel composition sensor's signal is stuck high (not fitted on this engine).

title: Fuel temperature sensor A circuit

title: Timing reference high-resolution signal A malfunction
meaning: A high-resolution engine timing reference signal is faulty.

meaning: The timing reference signal is producing extra pulses it shouldn't.

meaning: The timing reference signal is missing pulses it should produce.

title: Exhaust gas recirculation flow malfunction
meaning: The EGR system isn't recirculating exhaust gas the way the computer commands.

meaning: Less exhaust gas is being recirculated than commanded.

title: EGR flow excessive
meaning: More exhaust gas is being recirculated than commanded.

meaning: The vapor purge valve's control circuit is shorted.

title: EVAP vent control circuit open
meaning: The vapor vent valve's control circuit is open.

title: EVAP vent control circuit shorted
meaning: The vapor vent valve's control circuit is shorted.

title: EVAP vent valve/solenoid circuit
meaning: The vapor vent valve solenoid's circuit is faulty.

title: EVAP pressure sensor malfunction
meaning: The fuel-vapor system's pressure sensor is faulty.

title: EVAP pressure sensor range/performance
meaning: The fuel-vapor pressure sensor's reading is implausible.

title: EVAP pressure sensor low
meaning: The fuel-vapor pressure sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: EVAP pressure sensor high
meaning: The fuel-vapor pressure sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: EVAP pressure sensor intermittent
meaning: The fuel-vapor pressure sensor's signal cuts in and out.

title: EVAP small leak detected
meaning: The fuel-vapor system is losing a very small amount of pressure.

title: EVAP leak detected — fuel cap loose/off
meaning: The fuel-vapor system suggests the fuel cap isn't sealed.

title: EVAP purge control valve circuit low
meaning: The vapor purge valve's control circuit reads lower than expected.

title: EVAP purge control valve circuit high
meaning: The vapor purge valve's control circuit reads higher than expected.

title: Fuel level sensor circuit
meaning: The fuel level sensor's signal is faulty or missing.

title: Fuel level sensor range/performance
meaning: The fuel level reading doesn't behave the way a draining tank should.

title: Fuel level sensor circuit low
meaning: The fuel level sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: Fuel level sensor circuit high
meaning: The fuel level sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: Fuel level sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The fuel level sensor's signal cuts in and out.

title: Purge flow sensor circuit
meaning: The vapor purge flow sensor's signal is faulty.

title: Purge flow sensor range/performance
meaning: The vapor purge flow sensor's reading is implausible.

title: Purge flow sensor circuit low
meaning: The vapor purge flow sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: Purge flow sensor circuit high
meaning: The vapor purge flow sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: Purge flow sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The vapor purge flow sensor's signal cuts in and out.

title: Exhaust pressure sensor malfunction
meaning: The exhaust backpressure sensor's signal is faulty.

title: Exhaust pressure sensor range/performance
meaning: The exhaust backpressure reading is implausible.

title: Exhaust pressure sensor low
meaning: The exhaust backpressure sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: Exhaust pressure sensor high
meaning: The exhaust backpressure sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: Exhaust pressure sensor intermittent
meaning: The exhaust backpressure sensor's signal cuts in and out.

title: Exhaust pressure control valve malfunction
meaning: The exhaust backpressure control valve is faulty.

title: Exhaust pressure control valve range/performance
meaning: The exhaust backpressure control valve isn't behaving as commanded.

title: Exhaust pressure control valve low
meaning: The exhaust backpressure control valve's circuit reads low.

title: Exhaust pressure control valve high
meaning: The exhaust backpressure control valve's circuit reads high.

title: Exhaust pressure control valve intermittent
meaning: The exhaust backpressure control valve's circuit cuts in and out.

title: Cooling fan 1 control circuit
meaning: The primary cooling fan's control circuit is faulty.

title: Cooling fan 2 control circuit
meaning: A second cooling fan's control circuit is faulty.

title: Cooling fan 3 control circuit
meaning: A third cooling fan's control circuit is faulty.

title: Cooling fan rationality check
meaning: The cooling fan isn't spinning at the speed the computer expects.

title: Cooling fan circuit over current
meaning: The cooling fan circuit is drawing more current than it should.

title: Cooling fan power/ground circuit
meaning: The cooling fan's power or ground connection is faulty.

title: Vehicle speed sensor
meaning: The vehicle speed signal is faulty or missing.

title: Vehicle speed sensor range/performance
meaning: The vehicle speed reading doesn't behave the way real road speed does.

title: Vehicle speed sensor circuit low
meaning: The vehicle speed sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: Vehicle speed sensor intermittent/erratic/high
meaning: The vehicle speed signal is jumping around or reading too high.

title: Brake switch A/B correlation
meaning: The two brake pedal switches disagree with each other.

title: Idle control system circuit low
meaning: The idle air control circuit reads lower than expected.

title: Idle control system circuit high
meaning: The idle air control circuit reads higher than expected.

title: Closed throttle position switch circuit
meaning: The closed-throttle switch's circuit is faulty.

title: Idle control circuit
meaning: The idle air control circuit is faulty.

title: Starter request circuit
meaning: The starter request signal circuit is faulty.

title: Incorrect immobilizer key
meaning: The immobilizer doesn't recognize the key it's being asked to start with.

title: Battery/starter circuit range/performance
meaning: The battery-to-starter circuit isn't behaving as expected.

title: Battery temperature sensor circuit
meaning: The battery temperature sensor's signal is faulty.

title: Battery temperature sensor range/performance
meaning: The battery temperature reading is implausible.

title: Battery temperature sensor low
meaning: The battery temperature sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: Battery temperature sensor high
meaning: The battery temperature sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: Idle control system rationality error
meaning: The idle speed doesn't match what the idle control system commanded.

title: Engine oil pressure sensor/switch circuit
meaning: The oil pressure sensor's signal is faulty or missing.

title: Engine oil pressure sensor/switch range/performance
meaning: The oil pressure reading is implausible for current engine conditions.

title: Engine oil pressure sensor/switch low voltage
meaning: The oil pressure sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: Engine oil pressure sensor/switch high voltage
meaning: The oil pressure sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: Engine oil pressure too low
meaning: Oil pressure has dropped below the safe minimum — this can cause engine damage if ignored.

title: A/C refrigerant pressure sensor circuit
meaning: The air-conditioning pressure sensor's signal is faulty.

title: A/C refrigerant pressure sensor range/performance
meaning: The air-conditioning pressure reading is implausible.

title: A/C refrigerant pressure sensor low
meaning: The air-conditioning pressure sensor reads too low.

title: A/C refrigerant pressure sensor high
meaning: The air-conditioning pressure sensor reads too high.

title: Air conditioner refrigerant charge loss
meaning: The air-conditioning system has lost refrigerant.

title: Power steering pressure sensor circuit
meaning: The power steering pressure sensor's signal is faulty.

title: Power steering pressure sensor range/performance
meaning: The power steering pressure reading is implausible.

title: Power steering pressure sensor circuit low
meaning: The power steering pressure sensor's signal is stuck low.

title: Power steering pressure sensor circuit high
meaning: The power steering pressure sensor's signal is stuck high.

title: Power steering pressure sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The power steering pressure sensor's signal cuts in and out.

title: System voltage high
meaning: Supply voltage is higher than the computer expects.

title: Cruise control multi-function input circuit
meaning: The cruise control stalk/switch input circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control on signal
meaning: The cruise control "on" signal circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control off signal
meaning: The cruise control "off" signal circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control resume signal
meaning: The cruise control "resume" signal circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control set signal
meaning: The cruise control "set" signal circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control coast signal
meaning: The cruise control "coast" signal circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control accel signal
meaning: The cruise control "accelerate" signal circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control/brake switch A circuit
meaning: The cruise-control brake cutoff switch circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control/brake switch A circuit low
meaning: The cruise-control brake cutoff switch circuit reads low.

title: Cruise control/brake switch A circuit high
meaning: The cruise-control brake cutoff switch circuit reads high.

title: Cruise control multi-function input circuit low
meaning: The cruise control stalk/switch input circuit reads low.

title: Cruise control multi-function input circuit high
meaning: The cruise control stalk/switch input circuit reads high.

title: Cruise control/brake switch B circuit
meaning: A second cruise-control brake cutoff switch circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control/brake switch B circuit low
meaning: A second cruise-control brake cutoff switch circuit reads low.

title: Cruise control/brake switch B circuit high
meaning: A second cruise-control brake cutoff switch circuit reads high.

title: Cruise control servo control circuit
meaning: The cruise control throttle actuator's circuit is faulty.

title: Cruise control servo control circuit low
meaning: The cruise control throttle actuator's circuit reads low.

title: Cruise control servo control circuit high
meaning: The cruise control throttle actuator's circuit reads high.

title: Thermostat heater control circuit/open
meaning: The electronically-heated thermostat's control circuit is open.

title: Thermostat heater control circuit low
meaning: The electronically-heated thermostat's control circuit reads low.

title: Thermostat heater control circuit high
meaning: The electronically-heated thermostat's control circuit reads high.

title: Control module programming error
meaning: The engine computer's programmed data is corrupted or incomplete.

title: Internal control module keep-alive memory error
meaning: The engine computer's keep-alive memory failed its self-check.

title: Internal control module RAM error
meaning: The engine computer's working memory failed its self-check.

title: Internal control module ROM error
meaning: The engine computer's program memory failed its self-check.

title: Control module VSS output A malfunction
meaning: The engine computer's vehicle-speed output signal (A) is faulty.

title: Control module VSS output B malfunction
meaning: The engine computer's vehicle-speed output signal (B) is faulty.

title: Control module vehicle options error
meaning: The engine computer's configured vehicle options don't match what it's seeing.

title: Generator control circuit
meaning: The alternator's control circuit is faulty.

title: Generator lamp "L" control circuit
meaning: The alternator warning-lamp control circuit is faulty.

title: Generator field "F" control circuit
meaning: The alternator field control circuit is faulty.

title: Generator field terminal circuit low
meaning: The alternator field terminal circuit reads low.

title: Generator field terminal circuit high
meaning: The alternator field terminal circuit reads high.

title: Fuel pump A control circuit/open
meaning: The fuel pump control circuit is open.

title: Fuel pump A control circuit low
meaning: The fuel pump control circuit reads low.

title: Fuel pump A control circuit high
meaning: The fuel pump control circuit reads high.

title: VIN not programmed or incompatible — ECM/PCM
meaning: The engine computer's stored VIN is missing or doesn't match.

title: Immobilizer key not programmed — ECM/PCM
meaning: The engine computer doesn't recognize the immobilizer key as programmed.

title: Intake air heater control circuit
meaning: The intake air heater's control circuit is faulty (a diesel cold-start feature — not applicable on this petrol engine).

title: A/C clutch relay control circuit
meaning: The air-conditioning compressor clutch relay circuit is faulty.

title: A/C clutch relay control circuit low
meaning: The air-conditioning compressor clutch relay circuit reads low.

title: A/C clutch relay control circuit high
meaning: The air-conditioning compressor clutch relay circuit reads high.

title: Malfunction indicator lamp control circuit
meaning: The check-engine lamp's control circuit is faulty.

title: Engine RPM output circuit
meaning: The engine computer's RPM output signal to the instrument cluster is faulty.

title: Engine hot lamp output control circuit
meaning: The engine-hot warning lamp's control circuit is faulty.

title: Fuel level output circuit
meaning: The engine computer's fuel level output signal is faulty.

title: Intake manifold tuning valve control circuit (bank 1)
meaning: The variable intake manifold valve's control circuit is faulty.

title: Intake manifold tuning valve control circuit low (bank 1)
meaning: The variable intake manifold valve's control circuit reads low.

title: Intake manifold tuning valve control circuit high (bank 1)
meaning: The variable intake manifold valve's control circuit reads high.

title: Intake manifold tuning valve control circuit (bank 2)
meaning: A bank 2 variable intake manifold valve circuit is faulty (not applicable on this single-bank engine).

title: Glow plug module control circuit
meaning: The diesel glow-plug control module's circuit is faulty (not applicable on this petrol engine).

title: Cylinder 1 glow plug circuit
meaning: Cylinder 1's diesel glow plug circuit is faulty (not applicable on this petrol engine).

title: Cylinder 2 glow plug circuit
meaning: Cylinder 2's diesel glow plug circuit is faulty (not applicable on this petrol engine).

title: Cylinder 3 glow plug circuit
meaning: Cylinder 3's diesel glow plug circuit is faulty (not applicable on this petrol engine).

title: Cylinder 4 glow plug circuit
meaning: Cylinder 4's diesel glow plug circuit is faulty (not applicable on this petrol engine).

title: ECM/PCM power relay control circuit/open
meaning: The main engine-computer power relay circuit is open.

title: ECM/PCM power relay control circuit low
meaning: The main engine-computer power relay circuit reads low.

title: ECM/PCM power relay control circuit high
meaning: The main engine-computer power relay circuit reads high.

title: ECM/PCM power relay sense circuit/open
meaning: The engine computer can't sense its own power relay state — circuit open.

title: ECM/PCM power relay sense circuit low
meaning: The engine computer's power relay sense circuit reads low.

title: ECM/PCM power relay sense circuit high
meaning: The engine computer's power relay sense circuit reads high.

title: Transmission control system malfunction
meaning: The transmission computer has flagged a fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission control system range/performance
meaning: The transmission isn't behaving the way its computer expects (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission control system electrical
meaning: The transmission control system has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter/brake switch B circuit malfunction
meaning: A brake-switch input used by the transmission computer is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Clutch switch input circuit malfunction
meaning: The clutch pedal switch input to the transmission computer is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission range sensor circuit (PRNDL input)
meaning: The gear-selector position signal is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission range sensor range/performance
meaning: The gear-selector position reading is implausible (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission range sensor circuit low input
meaning: The gear-selector position signal is stuck low (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission range sensor circuit high input
meaning: The gear-selector position signal is stuck high (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission range sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The gear-selector position signal cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission fluid temperature sensor circuit
meaning: The transmission fluid temperature signal is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission fluid temperature sensor range/performance
meaning: The transmission fluid temperature reading is implausible (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission fluid temperature sensor circuit low
meaning: The transmission fluid temperature signal is stuck low (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission fluid temperature sensor circuit high
meaning: The transmission fluid temperature signal is stuck high (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission fluid temperature sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The transmission fluid temperature signal cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Transmission input speed sensor
meaning: The gearbox input speed signal is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Input/turbine speed sensor range/performance
meaning: The gearbox input speed reading is implausible (a transmission-side code).

title: Input/turbine speed sensor circuit no signal
meaning: The gearbox input speed sensor has stopped signaling (a transmission-side code).

title: Input/turbine speed sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The gearbox input speed signal cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter/brake switch B circuit low
meaning: A brake-switch input used by the transmission computer reads low (a transmission-side code).

title: Output speed sensor circuit malfunction
meaning: The gearbox output speed signal is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Output speed sensor range/performance
meaning: The gearbox output speed reading is implausible (a transmission-side code).

title: Output speed sensor circuit no signal
meaning: The gearbox output speed sensor has stopped signaling (a transmission-side code).

title: Output speed sensor circuit intermittent
meaning: The gearbox output speed signal cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter/brake switch B circuit high
meaning: A brake-switch input used by the transmission computer reads high (a transmission-side code).

title: Engine speed input circuit malfunction
meaning: The engine-speed signal reaching the transmission computer is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Engine speed input circuit range/performance
meaning: The engine-speed signal reaching the transmission computer is implausible (a transmission-side code).

title: Engine speed input circuit no signal
meaning: The engine-speed signal reaching the transmission computer has stopped (a transmission-side code).

title: Engine speed input circuit intermittent
meaning: The engine-speed signal reaching the transmission computer cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Incorrect gear ratio
meaning: The transmission isn't achieving the gear ratio it commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Gear 1 incorrect ratio
meaning: First gear isn't achieving its expected ratio (a transmission-side code).

title: Gear 2 incorrect ratio
meaning: Second gear isn't achieving its expected ratio (a transmission-side code).

title: Gear 3 incorrect ratio
meaning: Third gear isn't achieving its expected ratio (a transmission-side code).

title: Gear 4 incorrect ratio
meaning: Fourth gear isn't achieving its expected ratio (a transmission-side code).

title: Gear 5 incorrect ratio
meaning: Fifth gear isn't achieving its expected ratio (a transmission-side code).

title: Reverse incorrect ratio
meaning: Reverse gear isn't achieving its expected ratio (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter clutch circuit malfunction
meaning: The torque converter lockup clutch circuit is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter clutch circuit performance or stuck off
meaning: The torque converter lockup clutch isn't engaging when commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter clutch circuit stuck on
meaning: The torque converter lockup clutch is stuck engaged (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter clutch circuit electrical
meaning: The torque converter lockup clutch circuit has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Torque converter clutch circuit intermittent
meaning: The torque converter lockup clutch circuit cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid malfunction
meaning: A transmission hydraulic pressure control solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid performance or stuck off
meaning: A transmission pressure control solenoid isn't responding when commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid stuck on
meaning: A transmission pressure control solenoid is stuck engaged (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid electrical
meaning: A transmission pressure control solenoid circuit has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid intermittent
meaning: A transmission pressure control solenoid circuit cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid A malfunction
meaning: A transmission shift solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).

meaning: A transmission shift solenoid isn't responding when commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid A stuck on
meaning: A transmission shift solenoid is stuck engaged (a transmission-side code).

meaning: A transmission shift solenoid circuit has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid A intermittent
meaning: A transmission shift solenoid circuit cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid B malfunction
meaning: A second transmission shift solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).

meaning: A second transmission shift solenoid isn't responding when commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid B stuck on
meaning: A second transmission shift solenoid is stuck engaged (a transmission-side code).

meaning: A second transmission shift solenoid circuit has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid B intermittent
meaning: A second transmission shift solenoid circuit cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid C malfunction
meaning: A third transmission shift solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid C performance or stuck off
meaning: A third transmission shift solenoid isn't responding when commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid C stuck on
meaning: A third transmission shift solenoid is stuck engaged (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid C electrical
meaning: A third transmission shift solenoid circuit has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid C intermittent
meaning: A third transmission shift solenoid circuit cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid D malfunction
meaning: A fourth transmission shift solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid D performance or stuck off
meaning: A fourth transmission shift solenoid isn't responding when commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid D stuck on
meaning: A fourth transmission shift solenoid is stuck engaged (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid D electrical
meaning: A fourth transmission shift solenoid circuit has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid D intermittent
meaning: A fourth transmission shift solenoid circuit cuts in and out (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift solenoid E malfunction
meaning: A fifth transmission shift solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid B malfunction
meaning: A second transmission pressure control solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid B performance or stuck off
meaning: A second transmission pressure control solenoid isn't responding when commanded (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid B stuck on
meaning: A second transmission pressure control solenoid is stuck engaged (a transmission-side code).

title: Pressure control solenoid B electrical
meaning: A second transmission pressure control solenoid circuit has an electrical fault (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift malfunction
meaning: The transmission failed to complete a commanded shift correctly (a transmission-side code).

title: 1-2 shift malfunction
meaning: The 1-2 gear shift isn't completing correctly (a transmission-side code).

title: 2-3 shift malfunction
meaning: The 2-3 gear shift isn't completing correctly (a transmission-side code).

title: 3-4 shift malfunction
meaning: The 3-4 gear shift isn't completing correctly (a transmission-side code).

title: 4-5 shift malfunction
meaning: The 4-5 gear shift isn't completing correctly (a transmission-side code).

title: Shift/timing solenoid malfunction
meaning: A shift-timing solenoid is faulty (a transmission-side code).
